input.description:
**File**: `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/context.rs`

**What**: The git index (staging area) contains an older version of `context.rs` with inline entity I/O logic (entity_def, entity_dir with board special-casing, inline changelog management). The working tree has the correct EntityContext delegation version. If someone runs `git commit` without explicitly re-staging, the wrong version ships.

**Why**: The staged version contradicts the Card 6 architecture -- it special-cases board at `self.root.clone()` instead of using `boards/`, and duplicates I/O logic that belongs in EntityContext. An accidental partial commit would produce a broken or architecturally wrong artifact.

**Suggestion**:
- [ ] Run `git add swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/context.rs` to re-stage the working tree version
- [ ] Run `git add swissarmyhammer-entity/src/context.rs swissarmyhammer-entity/src/error.rs swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs swissarmyhammer-kanban/Cargo.toml swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/error.rs swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/lib.rs` to stage all Card 6 files
- [ ] Verify with `git diff --cached` that only the EntityContext-based delegation is staged
input.title: Fix stale staged context.rs conflicting with working tree
